title: EnderPearlCooldown
description: A Minecraft Plugin That Makes The Ender Pearl Be With Longer/Shorter Time with commands
body:
# 🌀 EnderPearl Cooldown

**EnderPearl Cooldown** is a lightweight plugin that lets you fully control the cooldown time of Ender Pearls on your server. Perfect for PvP, factions, and competitive gameplay where pearl-spamming needs to be balanced.

---

## ⚙️ Features

- 🕒 Custom cooldown via `config.yml`
- 📜 `/enderpearl cooldown set <time>` — accepts values like `5s`, `2m`, or `default`
- ⏱ Shows real cooldown overlay (white bar on hotbar item)
- 🔄 `/enderpearl reload` — instantly apply config changes
- ℹ️ `/enderpearl time get` — check the current cooldown setting
- 🧠 Tab-complete for all subcommands

---

## 🔐 Permissions

| Permission                    | Description                        | Default |
|------------------------------|------------------------------------|---------|
| `enderpearl.cooldown.base`   | Allows using base command          | true    |
| `enderpearl.cooldown.set`    | Allows changing the cooldown       | op      |
| `enderpearl.cooldown.reload` | Allows reloading the config        | op      |

---

✅ Built for Minecraft 1.21.3 - 1.21.5
🔌 Drop it in your `plugins` folder and you’re good to go!
